description: Trade Me AI appears to provide an AI-accessible interface related to Trade Me Property listings or property data in New Zealand. Public discovery did not reveal general developer documentation, APIs, or CLIs beyond the MCP endpoint.
summary: trademeai.co.nz exposes a public MCP server: Trade Me Property at https://chatgpt.trademeai.co.nz/api/v1/gateways/chatgpt/apps/trademe-property/v0.12/mcp; no other public developer surfaces were found.
